---
session: "`r session <- 4; session`"
topic: "`r library(tidyverse); topic <- read_csv('../key_dates.csv', name_repair='universal') |> filter(Course.Element == 'Class Session', Item.Number==session) |> pull(Details); topic`"
date: "Last Updated `r Sys.Date()`"
---

{{< include _latex_defines.qmd >}}

Topics: 

- Convex Functions
- Convex Sets
- Convex Optimization -> Global Optimality
- Gradient Methods
- Stochastic Gradient Methods
- Adaptivity & Momentum (Brief)
- Backprop and Automatic Differentiation
- Law of Large Numbers & Monte Carlo


```{r}
#| include: false
1+1
```

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ilg3gGewQ5U >}}

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tIeHLnjs5U8 >}}
